error_signature: PDF viewer downloads instead of displaying
title: PDF viewer downloads file instead of displaying it
symptom: When using the PDF viewer element with a URI, the PDF file downloads instead of being displayed. The sample URL works correctly, indicating an issue with the provided URI.
applies_when: Providing a URI for the PDF
root_cause: The PDF viewer element is designed to display PDFs directly from a base64 encoded string. When a URI is provided, if the server does not return the correct content type or headers, the browser may default to downloading the file instead of displaying it.
fix_steps: Convert the PDF file to a base64 encoded string
Provide the base64 string to the PDF viewer element instead of the URI
agent_instruction: Use a base64 encoded PDF string in the PDF viewer element.
